# FolderTree

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FolderTree;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FolderTree { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
directory, tree, browser

## Categories
files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/folder-tree)
